changes: Players will now receive the power of the Echo in Eden's Gate (Savage), increasing maximum HP, damage dealt, and healing potency by 10% upon entering.

new_content.name: Ishgardian Restoration
new_content.description: New restoration areas, materials, and expert recipes added to the Ishgardian Restoration system.

new_content.name: Kupo of Fortune
new_content.description: A game of chance where players exchange stamps collected from Ishgardian Restoration item deliveries for a Kupo of Fortune card.
new_content.npc_location: Potkin (The Firmament X:12.2 Y:14.6) / Lizbeth (The Firmament X:12.2 Y:14.6)

new_content.name: The Diadem
new_content.description: Gatherer-exclusive content for collecting items for Ishgardian Restoration recipes.

new_content.name: Ishgardian Restoration Rankings
new_content.description: System to tally skyward points earned by crafters and gatherers during the seasonal ranking period.

housing.name: Modern Mogseat
housing.description: Those who sit in this chair may be unable to get up again, but consider─will they really need to?

housing.name: Garment Rack
housing.description: Featuring the latest in Ishgardian fashion...which is generally traditional Ishgardian fashion.

housing.name: Moogle Round Table
housing.description: A charmingly rustic wooden table, attended by a trio of musical (though unmoving) moogles.

housing.name: Apron Rack
housing.description: Every literally or figuratively butterfingered chef needs a good apron or two.

housing.name: Lord Commander Portrait
housing.description: A commissioned portrait of Ser Aymeric entitled The Scion of House Borel. Original artist unknown.

housing.name: Azure Dragoon Portrait
housing.description: A commissioned portrait of Ser Estinien entitled simply Azure. Original artist unknown.
